name: nc-edit7
description: Multi-channel CNC NC code editor with plot interface

scripts.build: tsc && vite build && npm run copy-ncplot7py
scripts.build:ext: tsc && vite build && npm run copy-ncplot7py && node nc-edit7-desktop/nc-edit7-extension/scripts/bundle.js && cd nc-edit7-desktop/nc-edit7-extension && npm run compile && cd ../.. && vite build && npm run copy-ncplot7py
scripts.copy:ext: node nc-edit7-desktop/nc-edit7-extension/scripts/bundle.js && powershell -NoProfile -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'plugins/nc-edit7-extension' | Out-Null; robocopy 'nc-edit7-desktop/nc-edit7-extension' 'plugins/nc-edit7-extension' /MIR /R:2 /W:1 /NFL /NDL /NJH /NJS /NP; if ($LASTEXITCODE -gt 7) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } else { exit 0 }"
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && cd nc-edit7-desktop && npm run build:electron
